---
title: "Let's Connect!"
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:22px; font-size:1.15rem; line-height:1.7;">
    I am currently seeking full-time opportunities beginning in <strong>August 2026</strong>, and I would welcome the opportunity to connect regarding roles in <strong>analytics</strong>, <strong>operations</strong>, <strong>technology implementation</strong>, or <strong>process improvement</strong>.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:18px;">

    <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius:10px; padding:20px; background:#fff; font-size:1.15rem; line-height:1.7;">
      <div style="font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">
        Location &amp; Work Preferences
      </div>
      Based in <strong>New York City</strong>. Open to <strong>remote</strong>, <strong>hybrid</strong>, or <strong>in-person</strong> opportunities, as well as <strong>relocation</strong>.
    </div>

    <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius:10px; padding:20px; background:#fff; font-size:1.15rem; line-height:1.7;">
      <div style="font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">
        Work Authorization
      </div>
      Authorized to work in the United States and do not require sponsorship now or in the future.
    </div>

    <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius:10px; padding:20px; background:#fff; font-size:1.15rem; line-height:1.7;">
      <div style="font-weight:700; margin-bottom:10px;">
        Let’s Connect
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid; gap:10px;">
        <div>📧 <strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:ranxinj@gmail.com">ranxinj@gmail.com</a></div>
        <div>🔗 <strong>LinkedIn:</strong> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ranxin-jiang/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">linkedin.com/in/ranxin-jiang/</a></div>
        <div>💻 <strong>GitHub:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/rxjiang12" target="_blank" rel="noopener">github.com/rxjiang12</a></div>
      </div>

      <hr style="margin:18px 0; border:none; border-top:1px solid #eee;">

      Please feel free to reach out if you’d like to learn more about my project work or discuss potential opportunities!
    </div>

  </div>

</div>
```
